subject: A bald armored warrior with glowing red eyes wielding a large flaming red crystalline sword, striding through a battlefield
description: A powerfully built, bald humanoid figure strides forward through a chaotic battle scene. They wear heavy black plate armor decorated with embossed skull and claw motifs and are flanked on the left by a dark winged creature. Their eyes glow a deep red, and they carry a massive sword with a blade of crystalline red that blazes with flame — the weapon dominates the foreground. Reaching hands from downed or desperate enemies extend toward the figure from the right edge. Behind them the scene is crowded with fighters obscured in a dusty haze. The palette is dominated by deep blacks, crimson, and muted grays. The overall image reads as a warrior empowered by dark or demonic force cutting through opposition.
foreground: Armored bald warrior with glowing red eyes wielding a large flaming red crystalline sword
background: Dusty battlefield with multiple figures fighting, hazy atmosphere
emotion: Implacable, empowered — no readable facial expression beyond the red-eyed intensity, body language is dominant forward momentum
